series_metadata.series_description: Geological reference, brine study case files, maps, abstract prject, reports, forms, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 5 years after investigation, unless paper copy is scanned into an electronic format. After paper records as scanned into an electronic format, they may be destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years after investigation., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
